# Frostbyte API

> 40+ free APIs for developers and AI agents. One key, zero friction.

Frostbyte is a unified API platform providing 40+ production-ready services through a single API key. No signup required. Free tier with 200 credits.

## Base URL
https://api-catalog-three.vercel.app

## Authentication
All endpoints use Bearer token authentication:
```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```

Get a free key: `POST https://api-catalog-three.vercel.app/api/keys/create`

## Popular APIs

### IP Geolocation
- `GET /v1/agent-geo/geo/:ip` — City, region, country, coordinates, ISP, timezone

### Crypto Prices
- `GET /v1/defi-trading/prices` — Real-time prices for 500+ tokens

### Screenshots
- `GET /v1/agent-screenshot/screenshot?url=` — Capture any website as PNG

### Web Scraping
- `GET /v1/agent-scraper/scrape?url=` — Extract text, links, metadata from any URL

### DNS Lookup
- `GET /v1/agent-dns/api/resolve/:domain` — A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME records

### Code Execution
- `POST /v1/agent-coderunner/api/execute` — Run code in 10+ languages

### PDF Generation
- `POST /v1/agent-pdfgen/api/generate` — Generate PDFs from HTML/Markdown

### URL Shortener
- `POST /v1/agent-shorturl/api/shorten` — Shorten any URL

### Web Search
- `GET /v1/agent-search/api/search?q=` — Search the web programmatically

### Pastebin
- `POST /v1/agent-paste/api/pastes` — Create and share text snippets

### Email
- `POST /v1/agent-email/api/inboxes` — Disposable email inboxes for agents

### Crypto Wallets
- `POST /v1/frostbyte-wallet/api/v1/wallets` — Multi-chain wallet operations

## SDKs
- JavaScript/TypeScript: https://github.com/OzorOwn/frostbyte-api
- Python: https://github.com/OzorOwn/frostbyte-api
- MCP Server: https://github.com/OzorOwn/frostbyte-mcp
- GitHub Action: https://github.com/OzorOwn/frostbyte-screenshot-action

## Pricing
- Free: 200 credits (1 credit = 1 request), valid 30 days
- Paid: $1 USDC = 500 credits, valid 90 days

## Links
- Documentation: https://ozorown.github.io
- API Catalog: https://api-catalog-three.vercel.app
- Swagger Docs: https://api-catalog-three.vercel.app/docs
- OpenAPI Spec: https://api-catalog-three.vercel.app/openapi.json
- Blog: https://dev.to/ozorown
